origin.name: 人类
origin.desc: This item was created by a powerful 人类. It appears similar to a mundane item with one or two distinctive ornaments, such as writing, 宝石stones, or precious metals, and it may also incorporate im年龄ry from real life civilizations. 人类 items are made for practicality- the item has few powers, but it excels at them. Its powers are very straightforward, as well. These items often outlive the civilizations that created them, leaving their histories mysterious and unknowable.

origin.name: 矮人
origin.desc: This item was created by a dwarven master crafter or smith. It is made from the finest material available, potentially even silver, gold, platinum, mithral, or adamantine. It might be 专精ly decorated with the im年龄ry of one particular clan, and possess great significance to them, or it might be a technological marvel. It is most likely created for a singular purpose, and serves that purpose well.

origin.name: 精灵
origin.desc: This item was crafted by the 精灵 of the surface world. It is a beautiful object adorned with symbols of 自然 such as flowers, leaves, vines, or 星辰s. It is built for form as much as function, and it most likely has several powers, which might relate to 自然, dreams, healing, light, or destroying evil.

origin.name: 卓尔
origin.desc: This item was crafted by the dark 精灵. It may be solid black and crafted from metal or obsidian, or adorned with im年龄ry such as webs and spider legs. It might have powers relating to spiders, 黑暗, mind control, or demons, and it might be weakened or even destroyed in direct 太阳light.

origin.name: 元素生物 Air
origin.desc: The item was forged through the power of 元素生物 air by an 鸟羽人, djinn, air 元素裔, powerful air 元素生物, one of the Wind Dukes of Aaqa, or another resident of the plane of air. It is light blue or white colored and weighs very little, and may incorporate bird im年龄ry. It might have wind, cold, 闪电, 雷鸣, storm, or 飞行-based powers, or be able to summon creatures of 元素生物 air.

origin.name: 元素生物 Earth
origin.desc: The item was forged through the power of 元素生物 earth by a dao, earth 元素裔, powerful earth 元素生物, or another resident of the plane of earth. It is made of stone, metal, or 宝石stones, and may be unusually heavy. It might have stone, metal or weight-based powers, conjure fissures or earthquakes, or be able to summon creatures of 元素生物 earth.

origin.name: 元素生物 火焰
origin.desc: The item was forged through the power of 元素生物 fire by an azer, efreeti, fire 元素裔, powerful fire 元素生物, or another resident of the plane of fire. It is hot to the touch, likely red or orange, and may be made of brass or black iron. It has heat or fire-based powers, and may be able to summon creatures of 元素生物 fire.

origin.name: 元素生物 Water
origin.desc: The item was forged through the power of 元素生物 water by a 人鱼, 海精灵, marid, water 元素裔, 梭螺鱼人, powerful water 元素生物, or another resident of the plane of water. It is made of worked fish scales, shells, coral, or anything else that might be found under the sea. Its powers are 基于 water, liquid, mist, or rain, and may be able to summon creatures of 元素生物 water.

origin.name: 侏儒
origin.desc: This item was crafted by the diminutive 侏儒s. It is not especially powerful and 倒地 to breaking, but might just be useful enough to save the life of its user in their moment of need. It is 小型 and looks like a steampunk contraption, complete with unnecessary mechanical parts. The plane of Bytopia produces many such items.

origin.name: 深渊语
origin.desc: This item was created by a powerful demon or demon lord from the depths of the Abyss, or a demon cultist or 邪术师, for its精灵 or to send out into the world and 诅咒 whatever poor soul finds it. It is an asymmetrical item made of black iron, flesh, bone, or some unidentifiable 深渊语 material, and it bears screaming faces or dark runes. Its powers may cause madness, undeath, deformation or maiming, disease, pain, decay, or something else horrible. It may also be capable of conjuring demons. This item causes any non-demon immense discomfort, and will inflict madness, disease, pain, death, or 深渊语 corruption on its user.

origin.name: Angel
origin.desc: This item was created by an angel from the upper planes, possibly Arcadia, Bytopia, or Elysium, but usually Mount Celestia. It may be lightweight or radiate light. Its 外表 is gold and white, and it incorporates wings, halos, and 天界生物 bodies. It may also include eyes, rings, animal heads, or fire. Its powers might relate to truth, radiance, healing, or destroying evil. 魔族s find the item repulsive.

origin.name: Divine
origin.desc: This item was created by a god, a demigod (such as an empyrean), or a mortal with divine assistance. Its 外表 and powers depend entirely on the particular deity associated with it.

origin.name: 炼狱语
origin.desc: This item was created by a powerful devil (or rakshasa) from the Nine Hells, for its精灵, a cultist or 邪术师, a mortal soul who signed a contract with it, or a being it seeks to corrupt. It may have also been created by a devil cultist or 邪术师. It is most likely made of black iron, but may also be forged from horn, obsidian, or unmelting ice. It is a solid item, likely made for war, and may be able to inflict immense pain or even function as an instrument of torture. If made for a mortal, it attempts to corrupt its user and drive them to evil acts. It may also be capable of conjuring devils. If its 创造者 made the item for its精灵 or another yugoloth, it might be designed for fighting demons or other 魔族s. 天界生物s find the item repulsive.

origin.name: 仙灵
origin.desc: This item was crafted by 小型 fey creatures such as pixies, sprites, or 仙灵 dragons, likely as a gift. It is likely to be a 小型 item made from leaves, sticks, baubles, or perhaps silver or mithral. Its powers might be 基于 隐匿, trickery, 妖精荒野, or the magic of the specific creatures that created it. It also might play tricks on its user or cause surges of wild magic.

origin.name: Lich
origin.desc: This item was crafted by a lich, for its精灵 or for a thrall. The 创造者 might be a 类人生物 lich or a more monstrous variety of lich, such a dracolich or alhoon. It is made bones, flesh, and other corpse parts, and its 外表 incorporates im年龄ry of death. It most likely has necromancy powers, but may have any power suited for a 法师. It may also be the phylactery of its 创造者.

origin.name: Storm 巨人
origin.desc: This item was created by a storm giant, for its精灵 or a 类人生物 ally. It is made of steel, 宝石stones, or precious metals. If made for 类人生物s, it might be relatively light for a giant weapon, allowing 小型er creatures to use it at its full 体型. It most likely has 闪电, 雷鸣, storm, or weather powers, and might have powers related to air, water, 飞行, 游泳, or divination.

origin.name: 吸血鬼
origin.desc: This item was crafted by a 吸血鬼, for its精灵 or for a thrall. It is an immaculate and flawlessly crafted item, black, red, or silver in color, and incorporates im年龄ry of blood, bats, wolves, death, or the symbol of the 吸血鬼 who created it. It likely has blood-based powers, and may also have necromancy, 黑暗, regeneration, teleportation, mind control, 飞行, immortality, or shapechanging powers. The item may grow weaker in the 太阳light, or stronger in the 黑暗, and it may require blood from its user or from slain enemies. The 吸血鬼 may still exert some control over the item.

origin.name: 蛇人
origin.desc: This item was created by the snake-like 蛇人. It is made of steel, stone, 宝石stones, or precious metals, and invariably incorporates im年龄ry of snakes or serpent gods. It might have powers relating to snake conjuring or manipulation, shapechanging, mind control, or poison. The item's user might cease to feel emotions, or become tempted to indulge in cannibalism.

origin.name: Yugoloth
origin.desc: This item was created by a powerful yugoloth from the plane of Gehenna, for its精灵 or for a client that paid well. It is a warped and twisted metal instrument. It might have heat, cold, acid, poison, disease, 黑暗, 隐形, teleportation, or extraplanar powers. If its 创造者 made the item for its精灵 or another yugoloth, it might be designed for fighting other 魔族s. 天界生物s find the item repulsive.

origin.name: Cloud 巨人
origin.desc: This item was created by a cloud giant, for its精灵 or a 类人生物 ally. It is made of steel, 宝石stones, or precious metals. If made for 类人生物s, it might be relatively light for a giant weapon, allowing 小型er creatures to use it at its full 体型. It might have powers related to lightness or 飞行, or weather powers, including wind, rain, snow, heat, cold, 雷鸣, 闪电, or fog.

origin.name: 灰矮人
origin.desc: This item was created by a 灰矮人 master crafter or smith. It is as high quality as a dwarven weapon, but it looks very plain, lacking decoration of any kind, as if such items were mass-produced. Its powers might be 心灵, or involve 隐形 or temporary 体型-changing. It might be designed to inflict terrible pain, and it may be weakened in direct 太阳light.

origin.name: 火焰 巨人
origin.desc: This item was created by a fire giant, for its精灵 or a 类人生物 ally. It is made of stone, iron, or steel. It might be immensely heavy and hot to the touch. It is an item of great physical f兽人e, made for war. It might have heat or fire-based powers, or it might be made just for raw 力量.

origin.name: Ghost
origin.desc: This item was crafted by a ghost or other incorporeal 亡灵. It is either translucent and partially incorporeal, or it is a physical item haunted by its own 创造者. It can touch incorporeal things, and its powers may relate to incorporeality, seeing 隐形, or speaking to or summoning the souls of the dead. Like its 创造者, it is likely to disappear when its purpose has been fulfilled.

origin.name: 吉斯洋基人
origin.desc: This item was crafted by the 吉斯洋基人 of the astral plane. It always appears new, regardless of its actual 年龄, though it may be unfinished if its 吉斯洋基人 创造者 abandoned it in a fit of boredom. Its powers might be 心灵, telekinetic, or relate to the astral plane in some way. It might also be effective against 吉斯泽莱人 or mind flayers.

origin.name: 吉斯泽莱人
origin.desc: This item was crafted by the 吉斯泽莱人 of the plane of Limbo. It is, more than likely, forged of the chaos-stuff of Limbo, and only the sharpest of minds can use it- but those who can use it can shape it to their will using the power of their mind alone. It might also be effective against 吉斯洋基人 or mind flayers. Such items are often created for 武僧s, but can just as easily be made for others.

origin.name: 半身人
origin.desc: This item was crafted by the diminutive 半身人s. It is just as likely to be made for party tricks as it is for anything practical. 半身人 items with practical uses are not significantly powerful, and usually relate to 隐匿 or 幸运.

origin.name: Kraken
origin.desc: This item was created by a kraken or kraken cultist. It is made of rusty metal, driftwood, or worked coral and shells, and it either has a green-blue tint or is covered in algae or seaweed. Its 外表 incorporates cephalopod im年龄ry, especially tentacles. Its powers might involve water (especially destructive watery f兽人es such as tidal waves), 雷鸣 and 闪电, or the kraken's poisonous ink. It may also have tentacles attached to it that can move on command to perform some function, such as grappling an enemy.

origin.name: Mechanus
origin.desc: This item was created on Mechanus, the clockwork plane of ultimate order. It was likely forged by a modron heirarch. Its 外表 is bronze or copper-colored, and it may incorporate perfect geometric shapes, or gears and other mechanical parts. Its powers are extremely predictable and reliable (often not requiring a roll for abilities that normally do), and might relate to 构装生物s or creating order.

origin.name: Mummy Lord
origin.desc: This item was crafted by a mummy lord, for its精灵 or for a thrall. It is made of iron, steel, precious metals, or 宝石stones, but it appears old, worn, dusty, or wrapped in band年龄s, and it may have runes written on its surface or incorporate egyptian im年龄ry. It might have necromancy, rejuvenation, sand, fear, or immortality powers, and might inflict 诅咒s or mummy rot on its victims or even its unfortunate user.

origin.name: Aboleth
origin.desc: This item was created by an aboleth or aboleth cultist, for the aboleth, for a thrall, or to send out into the world and ensnare whatever poor soul finds it. It is slimy, fleshy, and disgusting. It might have water, telepathy, or mind control powers, or it may contain a fraction of the aboleths' ancient memories. The user risks contracting a disease, or worse.

origin.name: Beh年长
origin.desc: This item was created by a beh年长, for its精灵 or a thrall. Its 外表 incorporates beh年长 eyes and eye stalks, or im年龄ry relating to the specific beh年长 who made it. It might have powers relating to the beh年长's eye rays or antimagic cone, or powers to ensure the beh年长's safety, such as the ability to detect certain types of creatures. Attuning to or sleeping near this item causes its wielder to experience intense paranoia, or strange dreams that may even affect the waking world.

origin.name: Dryad
origin.desc: This item was crafted by a dryad, likely as a gift. It is invariably made of wood and has plant, animal, or water manipulation powers.

origin.name: 雅灵
origin.desc: This item was crafted by the 雅灵 of 妖精荒野. It is a beautiful object adorned with symbols of 自然 such as flowers, leaves, vines, or 星辰s. It might have charm, sleep, healing, teleportation, mind control, weather, wind, or cold powers, or its powers might relate to 妖精荒野 or the four seasons.

origin.name: 地精oid
origin.desc: This item was crafted by a 地精oid, almost certainly a 大地精. It is a tool of warfare and is barely distinguishable from a mundane 地精oid item, if at all. It has one use, which is most likely for 战斗, and always straightforward. It may have come from the plane of Acheron, where the 地精oids are locked in an endless battle against the 兽人s.

origin.name: Great Old One
origin.desc: This item was created by an eldritch abomination from the cosmos or ocean depths, or a cultist or 邪术师 of such a being. Its 外表 incorporates eyes, tentacles, mouths, and beaks, some of which might move on their own or whisper horrible gibbering sounds. Whatever its powers, they are great and terrible. Anyone using this item risks losing their mind, and few are 勇气 or 愚者ish enough to do so.

origin.name: Mind Flayer
origin.desc: This item was created by the illithids, for thems精灵 or their 类人生物 thralls. Its 外表 incorporates brains, mollusk im年龄ry, eyes, or tentacles. It might have mind reading, mind control, or extraplanar powers, or be capable of 心灵 attacks, and may be more effective in the hands of a user with high 智力. Mind flayers personalize their 魔法物品, so it may be connected to a specific individual, or require magical modifications to attune to it.

origin.name: Negative Energy
origin.desc: The item was forged with energy from the negative energy plane. It is cloaked in shadow, even while in 太阳light, and it has powers relating to 黑暗, rot, decay, death, or undeath.

origin.name: 兽人
origin.desc: This item was crafted by an 兽人, most likely a 牧师. It is a tool of warfare and is only distinguishable from a mundane 兽人ish item by one unusual decoration, such as fur or teeth from a beast. It has one use, which is most likely for 战斗, and always straightforward. It may have come from the plane of Acheron, where the 兽人s are locked in an endless battle against the 地精oids.

origin.name: Positive Energy
origin.desc: The item was forged with energy from the positive energy plane. It glows brightly, and it has powers relating to healing, radiance, or creating life.

origin.name: 印记城
origin.desc: This item was created in 印记城，万门之城 at the center of 多重宇宙. It is most likely fashioned from the stone, iron, or bronze that makes up most of 印记城's architecture. The item's powers could be anything, but it likely has extraplanar or otherwise obscure powers of some sort. Undoubtedly, the item is also a 钥匙 to a portal somewhere in the city of doors.

origin.name: Sphinx
origin.desc: This item was created by a sphinx. It resembles a mundane item, but jewel-encrusted, parts of it have the color and texture of sand, and it may incorporate egyptian im年龄ry. It is made for one specific purpose, might have sand-based or extraplanar powers, and is typically tied to the sphinx that created it in some way. These items are difficult to acquire without being given them by the sphinx its精灵, and knowingly taking one that rightfully belongs to someone else may incur the sphinx's wrath.

origin.name: Black 龙类
origin.desc: This item was created by a black dragon, for its精灵 or a minion. It may be made from the dragon's scales and 禽爪, precious metals and 宝石s from its hoard, 宝藏 looted from 废墟s and fallen civilizations, or bone and other remains. It might have powers 基于 acid, insects, or rot and decay, or powers that are especially brutal and painful.

origin.name: Blue 龙类
origin.desc: This item was created by a blue dragon, for its精灵 or a minion. It may be made from the dragon's scales and 禽爪, precious metals and 宝石s (especially sapphires) from its hoard, or reinf兽人ed glass. Its powers might be 基于 闪电 and 雷鸣, or sand.

origin.name: Brass 龙类
origin.desc: This item was created by a brass dragon, for its精灵, for a minion, or as a gift. It may be made from the dragon's scales and 禽爪, precious metals (especially brass) and 宝石s from its hoard, or reinf兽人ed glass. Its powers might be 基于 fire, sand, or the dragon's sleep breath, and it may be hot to the touch. Brass dragon items are likely to be sentient, or contain bound creatures, to sate the dragon's desire for 小型 talk.

origin.name: Bronze 龙类
origin.desc: This item was created by a bronze dragon, for its精灵, for a minion, or as a gift. It may be made from the dragon's scales and 禽爪, precious metals (especially bronze) and 宝石s (especially pearls) from its hoard, or materials found under the sea, such as fish scale, coral, or whalebone. Its powers might be 基于 闪电, 雷鸣, water, or the dragon's 斥力吐息. Bronze dragon items are most likely forged for warfare.

origin.name: Copper 龙类
origin.desc: This item was created by a copper dragon, for its精灵, for a minion, or as a gift. It may be made from the dragon's scales and 禽爪, precious metals (especially copper) and 宝石s from its hoard, or solid stone. Its powers might be 基于 acid, stone, mud, secrecy, or the dragon's slowing breath. An item made by a copper dragon is likely to incorporate music, stories, riddles, or pranks in some way, possibly at the expense of its user. Copper dragon items are often made for 吟游诗人s, as well.

origin.name: Green 龙类
origin.desc: This item was created by a green dragon, for its精灵 or a minion. It may be made from the dragon's scales and 禽爪, or precious metals and 宝石s (especially emeralds) from its hoard, and may be adorned with carvings or sculptures made by its captives. Its powers might be 基于 poison, plant manipulation, or thick fog.

origin.name: Gold 龙类
origin.desc: This item was created by a gold dragon, for its精灵, for a minion, or as a gift. It may be made from the dragon's scales and 禽爪, and it inevitably incorporates precious metals (especially gold) and 宝石s (especially pearls) from its hoard. Its powers might be 基于 fire, divination, dreams, wealth, or the dragon's weakening breath, and it may be hot to the touch. Gold dragon items are visibily expensive and may even require gold or items of value to be fed to them to work. Gold dragons can make more powerful items than any other dragon are well worth the cost.

origin.name: Red 龙类
origin.desc: This item was created by a red dragon, for its精灵 or a minion. It may be made from the dragon's scales and 禽爪, or precious metals and 宝石s (especially rubies) from its hoard. It is most likely hot to the touch, and its powers are 基于 fire, magma, or heat, and it may be able to cause fissures or quakes in the earth.

origin.name: Silver 龙类
origin.desc: This item was created by a silver dragon, for its精灵, for a minion, or as a gift. It may be made from the dragon's scales and 禽爪, precious metals (especially silver) and 宝石s from its hoard, or relics from 类人生物 civilizations. Its powers might be 基于 cold, fog, clouds, weather, or the dragon's paralyzing breath, and it may be cold to the touch. Silver dragon items are often made for 人类s or other short-lived races.

origin.name: White 龙类
origin.desc: This item was created by a white dragon, for its精灵 or a minion. It may be made from the dragon's scales and 禽爪, precious metals and 宝石s (especially diamonds) from its hoard, ivory, whalebone, rare furs, unmelting ice, or anything else the dragon can find in its arctic domain. It is most likely cold to the touch, and its powers are 基于 snow, ice, frigid water or fog, or cold.

origin.name: Annis Hag
origin.desc: This item was created by a powerful annis hag or hag coven. It is disgusting and incorporates fungi or the flesh and bone of dead creatures. It might be made of iron or wood and be 大型 and heavy. Its powers are bizarre and likely cause physical 伤害 or fear. Its user may be corrupted, or afflicted by fear or despair, and it's likely that the hag sent the item out into the world to cause misery.

origin.name: Bheur Hag
origin.desc: This item was created by a cruel bheur hag or hag coven. It is cold to the touch, and may incorporate the flesh and bone of creatures who froze to death. Its powers are bizarre and involve fear or the frigid cold. Its user may be corrupted, or afflicted by fear or despair, and it's likely that the hag sent the item out into the world to cause misery.

origin.name: Carceri
origin.desc: This item was created by a 魔族 or prisoner of the prison plane of Carceri, or a cultist or 邪术师 of such a being. It is an instrument made of twisted flesh or warped metal, and its power is to capture or restrain. An especially powerful item may banish victims to the prison plane its精灵- or point to a way out of it. 天界生物s find the item repulsive.

origin.name: Couatl
origin.desc: This item was created by a couatl, a 天界生物 winged snake. It bears magnificent red, orange, and white, and is likely made of wood, mithral, or precious metals. It is decorated with bird, snake, or 天界生物 im年龄ry, and it may be lightweight or radiate light. Its powers might relate to healing, divination (specifically future sight), protection, or shapechanging, and it might protect its user from scrying or mind reading. This item was undoubtedly made to carry out the couatl's purpose, whatever that may be.

origin.name: Death 骑士
origin.desc: This item was created by a death 骑士, an 亡灵 fallen 圣武士. It might also have been a normal item that was corrupted alongside the 圣武士 when they fell to 黑暗. It is a dark item, made from steel or bone. Its powers involve decay, 诅咒s, death, or undeath

origin.name: 龙类 Turtle
origin.desc: This item was created by a dragon turtle, for its精灵, for a minion, or as a gift. It may be made from parts of the dragon turtle's shell or 爪击, precious metals and 宝石s from its hoard, or materials found under the sea, such as fish scale, coral, or whalebone. Its powers might be 基于 water, steam, or the dragon turtle's protective shell. If made for a non-aquatic creature, it has 游泳 or water breathing powers.

origin.name: Frost 巨人
origin.desc: This item was created by a frost giant, for its精灵 or a 类人生物 ally. It is made of stone, iron, bone, or unmelting ice. It might be immensely heavy and cold to the touch. It is crude but functional, and whatever its purpose, it is an item of great physical f兽人e.

origin.name: Green Hag
origin.desc: This item was created by a vile green hag or hag coven. It may be slimy, disgusting, glassy, and might incorporate seaweed, barnacles, or the flesh and bone of dead creatures. Its powers are bizarre, and if it has water powers, the water is foul and polluted. Its user may be corrupted, or afflicted by fear or despair, and it's likely that the hag sent the item out into the world to cause misery.

origin.name: Ki-rin
origin.desc: This item was created by a Ki-rin, an enormous and magical 天界生物 stag. It bears magnificent orange, white, and golden colors. It might be made from the Ki-rin's scales, mane, tail, or horn, or precious metals and 宝石stones from its lair, and it may be lightweight or radiate light. Its powers might relate to radiance, healing, divination, protection, weather, 自然, teleportation, 求生, 飞行, or any of many other things. Its might also respond to questions the user asks it. Regardless of its powers, it is an item of pure good.

origin.name: 牛头人
origin.desc: This item was created by a powerful 牛头人 or 牛头人 cultist. It is crude but functional, being made of wood, stone, iron, bone, horn, or fur. The item has power relating to either labyrinths and navigation, or muderous 横行s.

origin.name: 纳迦
origin.desc: This item was created by a 纳迦. It is green and white (if created by a 警卫ian 纳迦) or black and red (if created by a spirit 纳迦) and bears im年龄ry of snakes, but otherwise resembles a mundane item. The item has poison, rejuvenation, or snake-based powers.

origin.name: 自然 天界生物
origin.desc: This item was created by a 天界生物 from the chaos-aligned upper planes of Elysium, Arborea, or the Beastlands. Its 外表 is gold and white, and it incorporates symbols of 动物 and 自然. Its powers might relate to 自然, or they might relate to celebration, dancing, feasting, and other such things. 魔族s find the item repulsive.

origin.name: Neogi
origin.desc: The item was created by the alien neogi, possibly for 类人生物 thralls. It has a distinctly spider-like 外表 to it, and may even have disturbing, moving spider legs attached to it. It might have mind control, poison, or extraplanar powers, or borrow power from an eldritch entity much greater than the neogi. It is possible that the item exerts some form of mind control over its user.

origin.name: Night Hag
origin.desc: This item was created by a 魔族ish night hag or hag coven. It is dark and colorless, and may incorporate the flesh of 类人生物s or larvae picked from Hades, or the remains of other unfortunate creatures. Its powers are bizarre, and might involve dreams, etherealness, or disease. Its user may be corrupted, or afflicted by fear or despair, and it's likely that the hag sent the item out into the world to cause misery. 天界生物s find the item repulsive.

origin.name: Oni
origin.desc: This item was created by an oni. It may be dark, blue-tinted, or surrounded by a visible magic aura. It is 大型, but may scale to a 体型 appropriate for its wielder. Its powers are designed to be used by the oni to stalk its victims, and might involve shapechanging, mind control, 隐形, 黑暗, or 隐匿.

origin.name: Pandemonium
origin.desc: This item was created by a 魔族 or lost soul from Pandemonium, the plane of madness, or a cultist or 邪术师 of such a being. It is an object made of stone, and it causes madness and 力竭 to its victims, its user, or both. It likely invokes the h枭人g winds of Pandemonium.

origin.name: Sea Hag
origin.desc: This item was created by a 皮甲ous sea hag or hag coven. It may be slimy, disgusting, diseased, or incorporate the flesh and bone of dead creatures. Its powers are bizarre, and might include illusion, 隐形, or 拟声. Its user may be corrupted, or afflicted by fear or despair, and it's likely that the hag sent the item out into the world to cause misery.

origin.name: 影灵
origin.desc: This item was crafted by the 精灵 of the shadowfell. It may be solid black, adorned with r艾文 im年龄ry, or crafted from metal, obsidian, bone, or solid shadow. It might have powers relating to r艾文s, 黑暗, death, memories, or teleportation, and it may gain power in the dark or lose it in the light. The item's user might cease to feel emotions, or be affected by shadowfell despair.

origin.name: Shadow 龙类
origin.desc: This item was created by a shadow dragon, for its精灵, for a minion, or as a gift. It may be made from the dragon's scales and 禽爪, precious metals and 宝石s from its hoard, bones or flesh from dead creatures, or solid 黑暗. Its powers are 基于 黑暗, 隐匿, the dragon's 吐息武器, or the shadowfell its精灵. A shadow dragon item may gain power in the dark, or lose it in the light, and its user risks falling victim to shadowfell despair or worse.

origin.name: Shape化兽者
origin.desc: This item was created by a doppelganger, lycanthrope, 幻身灵, or other 变形生物. Its 外表 might incorporate fur or skin from another creature, and it might have 隐匿, illusion, or shape化形 powers.

origin.name: Slaad
origin.desc: This item was created by a slaad from the chaotic plane of Limbo. Its 外表 is chaotic, nonsensical, and may constantly alter its精灵. It might also contain a slaad control 宝石. Its powers are invariably random and unpredictable, often to the point of unreliability, but they might include shapechanging or regenerative powers.

origin.name: Stone 巨人
origin.desc: This item was created by a stone giant, for its精灵 or a 类人生物 ally. It is made of stone and immensely heavy. It is crude but functional, and whatever its purpose, it is an item of great physical f兽人e.

origin.name: Unicorn
origin.desc: This item was created by a 天界生物 unicorn. It may be lightweight or radiate light. Its 外表 is gold and white, and it incorporates 自然, forest, and equine im年龄ry. Its powers might relate to healing, protection, 动物, radiance, or teleportation. An especially powerful item of this type might contain the unicorn's actual horn.

origin.name: Wraith
origin.desc: This item was created by a wraith, an 亡灵 incarnation of pure evil. It is solid black and may even be made of pure 黑暗, and its powers relate to 黑暗 or undeath. This item is dripping with malice, and it might be weakened or even destroyed in the 太阳light.

origin.name: Ysgardian
origin.desc: This item was created by an inhabitant of the plane of Ysgard, usually a heroic soul who died and ascended to the plane. It is invariably a powerful weapon or armor designed for 战斗 with great monsters or powerful evils. It is made from the finest materials available, decorated with the spoils of battle, and may incorporate norse im年龄ry. The item might be designed to fight a particular type of enemy (usually evil monsters or 魔族s), and grow more powerful the more battles against such foes are won by its user. It might also have a limited ability to resurrect its user, should they fall in battle.

majorprop.name: Greater 施法
majorprop.desc: This item can be used to cast one or two 法术, or many 法术 if created for a spellcaster. Using it to cast 法术 expends 冲锋s, and the item regains 冲锋s at dawn.

majorprop.name: Healing
majorprop.desc: This item can restore 生命值 to creatures, cure them of 诅咒s, diseases, or poisons, regrow their lost body parts, or resurrect them.

majorprop.name: Magic Attack
majorprop.desc: This item has a magical attack unique to its精灵.

majorprop.name: Blessing
majorprop.desc: The user of this item can use it to grants some temporary boon to their allies, such as temporary 生命值, additional 伤害 with attacks, bonuses to rolls, or 优势 on certain checks or saves.

majorprop.name: 状态
majorprop.desc: This item inflicts a condition upon enemies (目盲, 魅惑, 耳聋, 恐慌, 失能, 麻痹, 石化, 中毒, 倒地, 束缚, 震慑, or asleep, diseased, insane, etc).

majorprop.name: Damaging
majorprop.desc: This item can be used to deal extra 伤害 of some type to foes, such as fire, cold, 闪电, 雷鸣, acid, or poison.

majorprop.name: 元素生物
majorprop.desc: This item can be used to conjure or manipulate air, earth, fire, water, 闪电, heat, cold, acid, or another element.

majorprop.name: Foe
majorprop.desc: This item is designed to fight monsters of a certain type. It may warn its user when such enemies are near, be extra effective against them in 战斗, weaken them when they are nearby, prevent them from approaching its user, or banish them to their plane of origin.

majorprop.name: Protective
majorprop.desc: This item grants a boost to its user's AC, saves, or maximum 生命值, or grants them temporary 生命值, protection against a certain type of attack (such as projectile weapons), 优势 on 豁免 on 法术. It might make its user take half 伤害 when failing certain save-for-half rolls or no 伤害 on a success. It might also have the ability to temporarily grant advanced protection.

majorprop.name: 隐匿
majorprop.desc: This item is made for 隐匿 or disguise. It might mask its user's 外表, prevent them from making noise, or turn them 隐形.

majorprop.name: Transforming
majorprop.desc: This item can transform into a different type of item with a different function, or many different types of item. For instance, a sword that can transform into a bladed whip, or 皮甲 its精灵 by transforming into a cane.

majorprop.name: Athletic
majorprop.desc: This item enables its user to climb or swim better, increases their jump distance, allows them to walk on walls, removes penalties from 困难地形, reduces fall 伤害, or has some other similar ability.

majorprop.name: Aquatic
majorprop.desc: This item grants its user a 游泳速度, water breathing, or both, or it grants some other underwater-appropriate power.

majorprop.name: 冲锋d
majorprop.desc: This item allows its user to deal 伤害 to objects or enemies by expending health, spell slots, or another resource.

majorprop.name: Communication
majorprop.desc: This item allows its user to speak (normally or telepathically) with creatures far away, creatures they do not share a 语言 with, or things that cannot normally speak such as plants and 动物.

majorprop.name: Conjuring
majorprop.desc: This item can conjure one or more types of creature. The creatures may be loyal, reluctant, or 敌对, depending on their 自然.

majorprop.name: Container
majorprop.desc: This item magically stores a multitude of non-magical items (such as rope, arrows, or oil), or disposable 魔法物品 (such as healing potions or magic beans), which can be removed when needed. The items it contains do not increase its weight.

majorprop.name: Cursing
majorprop.desc: This item inflicts a 诅咒 upon foes. It may prevent them from taking certain 动作, reduce their maximum 生命值, or render them unable to be healed.

majorprop.name: Demiplane
majorprop.desc: This item is linked to a demiplane which can contain items or creatures. It may be used for stor年龄, or for something else. A weaker item might have a 小型, empty demiplane, but a stronger item may have a 大型r demiplane with its own native environment or even permanent inhabitants.

majorprop.name: Ethereal
majorprop.desc: This item can transport its user, enemies struck with it, items, or something else to and from the Border Ethereal.

majorprop.name: Explosive
majorprop.desc: This item can be used to cause massive 伤害 to all creatures, items, and terrain within a specific radius. It can likely be thrown, as its user is not 免疫.

majorprop.name: 飞行
majorprop.desc: This item grants its user the power of 飞行 or levitation.

majorprop.name: Illusory
majorprop.desc: This item conjures up specific illusions, which may disguise its精灵 or its user, or be able to move and act independently for a short time.

majorprop.name: Light/黑暗
majorprop.desc: This item glows brightly when its user wills it, and its light may even be 太阳light. If evil, it might instead cloak the area around it in magical 黑暗.

majorprop.name: Limited 法术
majorprop.desc: Parts of this item can be torn off and expended to cast powerful 法术.

majorprop.name: 幸运
majorprop.desc: If this item's user rolls poorly on certain saves or checks, it may allow them a reroll or an automatic success.

majorprop.name: Magic 盾牌
majorprop.desc: This item immunizes its user against scrying, mind reading, fear, charm, or some other undesirable magical effect.

majorprop.name: Mind Control
majorprop.desc: This item allows its user to attempt to mind control other creatures.

majorprop.name: 抗性
majorprop.desc: This item grants resistance to a certain type of 伤害, or 免疫 to poison or 心灵 伤害.

majorprop.name: Safe Zone
majorprop.desc: This item temporarily protects its user and their allies within a 小型 area. Creatures in the area may be protected from attacks from outside, regain 生命值 at the 星辰t of their turn, or some similar effect.

majorprop.name: Sensory
majorprop.desc: This item grants its user specific 感官, such as 黑暗视觉, 盲视, 震颤感知, 真实视觉 (if it's especially powerful), a bonus to 察觉, or the ability to sense magic. It may be an item that must be used, such as a lens that gives the user darksight while looking through it or a t兽人h that reveals 隐形 creatures and objects touched by its light, or it might simply impart these 感官 upon its user.

majorprop.name: Shape化形
majorprop.desc: This item can polymorph its user into a different type of creature.

majorprop.name: 速度y
majorprop.desc: This item enables its user to move or take certain 动作 more quickly. It most likely enables them to do something that normally requires a full action as a 附赠动作.

majorprop.name: 求生
majorprop.desc: This item allows its user to survive without food or water, without air, in places of extreme heat or cold, or in planes 敌对 to life its精灵.

majorprop.name: Teleportation
majorprop.desc: This item can teleport creatures or items, either short range (such as a place the user can see) or long range (such as another place on the same plane).

majorprop.name: Unfolding
majorprop.desc: This item can transform into a 大型 item, such as a boat, cabin, or fortress.

majorprop.name: Animal
majorprop.desc: This item is made for a non-sentient companion, such as a horse, or it has the power to manipulate certain 动物.

majorprop.name: Antimagic
majorprop.desc: This item cancels or dispels certain types of magic, such as necromancy 法术, teleportation magic, healing magic, 心灵 powers, or 法术 cast below 4th level.

majorprop.name: Animate
majorprop.desc: This item acts on its own when its user wills it.

majorprop.name: Animating
majorprop.desc: This item can create temporary or permanent 构装生物s to serve its user.

majorprop.name: Astral
majorprop.desc: This item has some connection to the astral plane, such as enabling its user to astrally project.

majorprop.name: Attractive/Repulsive
majorprop.desc: This item can be used to push, pull, grab, or grapple items or creatures.

majorprop.name: Bulwark
majorprop.desc: The user of this item has 优势 on 豁免 made to maintain 专注.

majorprop.name: Concealing
majorprop.desc: This item can conjure sand, fog, magical 黑暗, or some other means of concealing its user.

majorprop.name: Deadly
majorprop.desc: This item can be used to wound a creature, sever its limbs or head, or kill it instantly.

majorprop.name: Destructive
majorprop.desc: This item can obliterate certain types of matter (or just anything).

majorprop.name: Divination
majorprop.desc: This item has a very limited ability to see or predict the future.

majorprop.name: Im带动
majorprop.desc: This item can be stuck to a creature or object, or affixed to a particular point, and is extremely difficult to remove.

majorprop.name: Locator
majorprop.desc: This item knows the direction to the nearest object or location of a certain type, such as food, running water, temples to a specific god, or interplanar portals.

majorprop.name: Magic Absorption
majorprop.desc: This item can absorb 法术 of a certain level or below, cancelling them or turning them into 生命值 or spell slots for its user. An especially powerful item might be able to redirect 法术 at their caster.

majorprop.name: Magic Detection
majorprop.desc: This item can detect nearby magic, and may be able to identify it to some degree.

majorprop.name: Magic Storing
majorprop.desc: This item can be used to restore spell slots or some other resource expended by its user, or it can store 法术 cast into it.

majorprop.name: Observer
majorprop.desc: This item can impart its user with some knowledge of the surrounding area, such as a map, the locations of traps, or the types of creature nearby.

majorprop.name: Planar Travel
majorprop.desc: This item can transport the user or a group of people to another plane of existence, temporary or permanently, or banish enemies there.

majorprop.name: Polymorphic
majorprop.desc: This item can transform into a particular type of creature or other living thing, usually a non-sentient or semi-sentient creature.

majorprop.name: Random
majorprop.desc: When used, this item causes a random effect. It has a mix of harmful and helpful effects.

majorprop.name: Restraining
majorprop.desc: This item can prevent creatures from moving, taking certain 动作, or teleporting, or it can imprison them.

majorprop.name: Safe警卫
majorprop.desc: This item protects its user against death. It might allow them to drop to 1 hit point instead of falling 昏迷, automatically stabilize them when knocked out, or allow their soul to remain on the plane for resurrection after they die.

majorprop.name: Scanner
majorprop.desc: This item can impart its user with some knowledge of nearby creatures, such as their thoughts, 阵营, 虚弱es, or if they are shapeshifted.

majorprop.name: 体型-changing
majorprop.desc: This item can change the 体型 of its精灵, its user, or something else.

majorprop.name: Stat Boost
majorprop.desc: This item increases one of its user's ability scores to a certain number, or has no effect if their ability score is higher than that number. It likely increases a stat that its intended user would be poor at (for instance, 智力 for a 野蛮人).

majorprop.name: Terrain-altering
majorprop.desc: This item can alter the nearby terrain. It turns normal terrain into 困难地形, grow trees, conjure stone spikes or walls, or dig holes in the ground, or it has some other similar effect.

majorprop.name: Transmuting
majorprop.desc: This item can transmute one type of item or substance into another, or create inexpensive items or substances out of nothing (such as food, water, or rope).

majorprop.name: Vampiric
majorprop.desc: This item can steal 生命值 from creatures and use them to empower its精灵 or its user.

majorprop.name: Weather Control
majorprop.desc: This item can control the local weather or climate. It is a rare and valuable item.

majorprop.name: Wish-granting
majorprop.desc: This item can grant its user wishes. It is an extremely rare and valuable item.

minorprop.name: Ability
minorprop.desc: The user of this item has proficiency, 优势, or some other bonus on a particular ability.

minorprop.name: Aligned
minorprop.desc: This item is good or evil and gains a boost to its powers when its user commits an act of that 阵营.

minorprop.name: Altar
minorprop.desc: The user of this items can make offerings or sacrifices to it or a powerful entity it is associated with. If the item or entity is pleased, the item or user gains a temporary boost.

minorprop.name: Bloodthirsty
minorprop.desc: This grants its精灵 or its user a temporary boost when its user kills an enemy or reduces it to 0 生命值.

minorprop.name: 羁绊
minorprop.desc: This item is magically bonded to its user, and allows them to conjure it if it is not on their person. If already bonded to another, the bond may be difficult to break.

minorprop.name: Compass
minorprop.desc: This item points directly to a known place in the world, regardless of distance, or just straight north.

minorprop.name: Critical Hitter
minorprop.desc: This item has some special effect when its user scores a critical hit.

minorprop.name: Decoy
minorprop.desc: When the user of this item takes 伤害, the item instead takes some or all of the 伤害. It can only absorb a limited amount of 伤害 before breaking or becoming temporarily unusable.

minorprop.name: Distant
minorprop.desc: This item works at a much longer range than similar items of its type.

minorprop.name: Edible
minorprop.desc: This item can be eaten.

minorprop.name: Eye
minorprop.desc: This item allows its user to see or hear through it. This property may not work if the item is too far away, on a different plane of existence, or protected by abjuration magic or solid lead.

minorprop.name: 朋友
minorprop.desc: This grants 优势 on 魅力 checks made to interact with creatures of a certain type.

minorprop.name: Illusory 外表
minorprop.desc: Illusions mask this item's true form. Its user might be able to manipulate these illusions.

minorprop.name: Indestructible
minorprop.desc: This item is 免疫 to all 伤害 except one specific type, or it can only be destroyed through special means.

minorprop.name: Invisibile
minorprop.desc: This item can be made 隐形 while worn or carried.

minorprop.name: Item Destroyer
minorprop.desc: This item is extra effective at destroying inanimate objects.

minorprop.name: Lie Detector
minorprop.desc: This item grants a bonus or 优势 on checks to determine if a creature is lying.

minorprop.name: Lightweight
minorprop.desc: This item weighs very little.

minorprop.name: Lingual
minorprop.desc: This item allows its user to read, write, speak, and understand a certain 语言, usually one associated with its 创造者.

minorprop.name: Lesser 施法
minorprop.desc: This item can be used to cast a particular cantrip or low-level spell when its user wills it.

minorprop.name: Lunar/Solar
minorprop.desc: In the 太阳light or 月亮light, this gains a boost to its abilities. A lunar item might instead gain powers under the full 月亮.

minorprop.name: Multipurpose
minorprop.desc: In addition to its main purpose, this item can also be used as a weapon, shield, or 施法 implement.

minorprop.name: Nondetection
minorprop.desc: This item makes no sound and leaves no trace of its presence.

minorprop.name: Planar
minorprop.desc: This item is attuned to a particular plane of existence other than the material plane, and has some special effect while on that plane. For instance, an item attuned to the shadowfell might make its user 免疫 to shadowfell despair.

minorprop.name: Predictive
minorprop.desc: This item can accurately predict the weather up to a few days into the future.

minorprop.name: Reactive
minorprop.desc: When the user of this item sees an ally be attacked, take 伤害, or some other trigger, they can use their 反应 to grant them a boon of some kind.

minorprop.name: S精灵 Destruct
minorprop.desc: This item has some powerful magical effect that activates when it is destroyed.

minorprop.name: Telepathic
minorprop.desc: This item grants its user telepathy, either short-range or only under certain 状态.

minorprop.name: Tracker
minorprop.desc: This item can track down nearby creatures given a 微型 amount of their flesh, blood, or scent, or one of their possessions.

minorprop.name: Traceable
minorprop.desc: The user of this item knows its location when it is not on their person, or they can follow the path it has traveled since they last had it. This property may not work if the item is too far away, on a different plane of existence, or protected by abjuration magic or solid lead.

minorprop.name: Unmoving
minorprop.desc: This item prevents its user from being moved against their will.

minorprop.name: Watcher
minorprop.desc: This item might warn its user of approaching danger, making them unable to be 措手不及 and granting a 小型 initiative bonus.

specialprop.name: Aging/年龄less
specialprop.desc: This item causes its user to 年龄 quickly, or slow or cease aging.

specialprop.name: Alive
specialprop.desc: This item moves about on its own when not in use. It might mysteriously reappear in its user's possession if they lose or discard it.

specialprop.name: Attracting
specialprop.desc: This item tends to attract certain types of 动物 or supernatural creatures.

specialprop.name: Bound Creature
specialprop.desc: This item contains a supernatural creature that powers its abilities. It may be resting in the item to recover, imprisoned in the item against its will, or haunting the item. If it gets out of the item, it might be grateful for the user's help, or attack them in a r年龄.

specialprop.name: Ceremonial
specialprop.desc: This item was created to be used in a special magical ritual.

specialprop.name: Contact
specialprop.desc: This item allows its user to contact some powerful entity (most likely the item's 创造者)- or for the entity to contact them.

specialprop.name: Coveted
specialprop.desc: This item is highly sought after. Others may offer to buy the item from its user at a high price, or more likely attempt to kill them and take it.

specialprop.name: 诅咒d
specialprop.desc: This item has a 诅咒 placed on it that causes its wielder some negative effect. It might also make it difficult for its user to get rid of it.

specialprop.name: 伤害d
specialprop.desc: This item is a broken shadow of its former s精灵. It may be possible to repair it.

specialprop.name: Difficult
specialprop.desc: This item is poisonous, acidic, spiked, extremely hot or cold, or some other trait that makes it difficult or impossible to use without special gear or magic.

specialprop.name: Emotional
specialprop.desc: This item enhances or suppresses the emotions of its user.

specialprop.name: Esoteric
specialprop.desc: This item has secret properties that can be unlocked, though doing so will prove difficult.

specialprop.name: Exhausting
specialprop.desc: The user of this item risks becoming exhausted, diseased, or injured when they use it.

specialprop.name: Haunted
specialprop.desc: The spirit of this item's 创造者, one of its former users, or a victim still lingers around it, and will not depart until its purpose has been fulfilled.

specialprop.name: Hidden Secret
specialprop.desc: This item contains a hidden mes智者 or other secret that only appears under certain 状态.

specialprop.name: Historic
specialprop.desc: This item was used to perform a deed of great goodness or great evil. Many people will recognize it and react accordingly.

specialprop.name: Hungry
specialprop.desc: This item requires "food" of some kind (most likely blood), and will not function if not fed.

specialprop.name: 钥匙
specialprop.desc: This item is the 钥匙 to a lock or portal sealed with powerful magic.

specialprop.name: Life-granter/Life-stealer
specialprop.desc: 小型 life forms such as grass, flowers, or insects grow or wither in this item's presence.

specialprop.name: Lost
specialprop.desc: This item bears some special significance to a person or group, who have lost it and would like to see it returned.

specialprop.name: Madness
specialprop.desc: The user of this item risks going mad.

specialprop.name: Manipulative
specialprop.desc: This item will try to drive its user to commit certain acts, or prevent them from committing such acts (for instance, acts of good or evil).

specialprop.name: Mark
specialprop.desc: When used, this item leaves a visible and recognizable mark on its target or the surrounding terrain.

specialprop.name: Memories
specialprop.desc: This item contains fragments of memory from its 创造者 or previous user(s). While using it, attuned to it, or sleeping near it, its user might be able to access these memories, or they might see them in brief flashes.

specialprop.name: Musical
specialprop.desc: When used, this item plays a song or song fragment.

specialprop.name: Mysterious
specialprop.desc: This item has a mysterious and unknown history. It contains some clue to its background, such as inscriptions of text, runes, or a symbol, or speaking a certain phase.

specialprop.name: Noisy
specialprop.desc: This item makes a loud noise when used.

specialprop.name: Obsession
specialprop.desc: The user of this item risks becoming obsessed with it and unwilling to part with it.

specialprop.name: Possessive
specialprop.desc: Once this item has an owner, it is very difficult for another to claim it. It may require its owner to relinquish it, or for the new user to kill them.

specialprop.name: Sentient
specialprop.desc: This item is alive and can speak to its user or others. It has some amount of control over how it is used and may be able to reject users it deems unfit.

specialprop.name: Set
specialprop.desc: This item is part of a set. The other item(s) in the set have similar abilities, and combining them might produce an more powerful item.

specialprop.name: Symbolic
specialprop.desc: This item is symbolic of holding a high position or of owning something significant, such as a lost 宝藏 or a far-away fortress. People might mistakenly assume its user is the legitimate owner, or merely having the item might be enough to grant its user legitimate ownership.

specialprop.name: Testing
specialprop.desc: This item will test any potential user to determine if they are worthy of it.

specialprop.name: Timepiece
specialprop.desc: This item displays the current date, time, or phase of the 月亮, or it displays a countdown until a certain event.

specialprop.name: Trap
specialprop.desc: This item was secretly created to kill, capture, or manipulate its user.

specialprop.name: Vengeful 创造者
specialprop.desc: The 创造者 of this item wants it back or disapproves of its current user, and seeks to destroy them or steal back the item. It might learn the item's location whenever the item is used.

specialprop.name: Worn
specialprop.desc: This item is worn from lack of use, but will regain its power the more it is used.
